name: Margarita Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups vanilla low-fat ice cream, softened
1 6 oz ready-made reduced-fat graham cracker crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Freeze a glass or metal bowl for 30 minutes.
2. Immediately add the first four ingredients to the bowl; stir well.
3. Return the mixture to the freezer for 30 minutes.
4. Spoon the partially frozen mixture into the crust; cover.
5. Freeze at least 4 hours.
